productName: Stinger Sweets Razzberry Blaze .5g 2pk - Razzberry Blaze - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Razzmatazz supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a sweet, ripe berry flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
